items.title: MegaTrain: Full Precision Training of 100B+ Parameter Large Language Models on a Single GPU
items.abstract: We present MegaTrain, a memory-centric system that efficiently trains 100B+ parameter large language models at full precision on a single GPU. Unlike traditional GPU-centric systems, MegaTrain stores

items.title: How Well Do Agentic Skills Work in the Wild: Benchmarking LLM Skill Usage in Realistic Settings
items.abstract: Agent skills, which are reusable, domain-specific knowledge artifacts, have become a popular mechanism for extending LLM-based agents, yet formally benchmarking skill usage performance remains scarce.
